mapper.select:
SELECT SABUN, ID, PASSWORD, NAME, INUSER, INDATE
, NVL(BASICDATA, 'N') AS BASICDATA_STATUS , NVL(PURCHASE, 'N') AS PURCHASE_STATUS , NVL(FABRIC, 'N') AS FABRIC_STATUS , NVL(PRODUCTION, 'N') AS PRODUCTION_STATUS , NVL(SALES, 'N') AS SALES_STATUS , NVL(QUALITY, 'N') AS QUALITY_STATUS , NVL(DASHBOARD, 'N') AS DASHBOARD_STATUS
, NVL(USERINFO, 'N') AS BASICDATA_USERINFO , NVL(PRODUCTINFO, 'N') AS BASICDATA_PRODUCTINFO , NVL(BOMINFO, 'N') AS BASICDATA_BOMINFO , NVL(CONSIGNEE, 'N') AS BASICDATA_CONSIGNEE , NVL(WAREHOUSELAYOUT, 'N') AS BASICDATA_WAREHOUSELAYOUT
, NVL(PALLETLABELLIST, 'N') AS PURCHASE_PALLETLABELLIST , NVL(INCOMING, 'N') AS PURCHASE_INCOMING , NVL(INCOMINGRETURN, 'N') AS PURCHASE_INCOMINGRETURN , NVL(WIP, 'N') AS PURCHASE_WIP , NVL(WIPRETURN, 'N') AS PURCHASE_WIPRETURN , NVL(LOAD, 'N') AS PURCHASE_LOAD , NVL(LOADRETURN, 'N') AS PURCHASE_LOADRETURN , NVL(LOCATIONSTATUS, 'N') AS PURCHASE_LOCATIONSTATUS , NVL(STOCK, 'N') AS PURCHASE_STOCK , NVL(STOCKCOUNT, 'N') AS PURCHASE_STOCKCOUNT , NVL(MOVEMENTSTORAGE, 'N') AS PURCHASE_MOVEMENTSTORAGE , NVL(MOVEMENTFACTORY, 'N') AS PURCHASE_MOVEMENTFACTORY , NVL(UNPACK, 'N') AS PURCHASE_UNPACK , NVL(EXCEPTIONINPUT, 'N') AS PURCHASE_EXCEPTIONINPUT , NVL(EXCEPTIONOUTPUT, 'N') AS PURCHASE_EXCEPTIONOUTPUT , NVL(PURCHASEFEEDING, 'N') AS PURCHASE_FEEDING , NVL(STOCKINFO, 'N') AS PURCHASE_STOCKINFO , NVL(LOTHISTORY, 'N') AS PURCHASE_LOTHISTORY , NVL(STOCKMOVEMENT, 'N') AS PURCHASE_STOCKMOVEMENT , NVL(STOCKCOMPARE, 'N') AS PURCHASE_STOCKCOMPARE
, NVL(SEMIPRODUCTION, 'N') AS PRODUCTION_SEMIPRODUCTION , NVL(TRANSFER, 'N') AS PRODUCTION_TRANSFER , NVL(PRODUCTIONPRODUCTIONPRODUCTION, 'N') AS PRODUCTION_PRODUCTIONPRODUCTION , NVL(PRODUCTIONWIPINPUT, 'N') AS PRODUCTION_WIPINPUT , NVL(PRODUCTIONWIPRETURN, 'N') AS PRODUCTION_WIPRETURN , NVL(PRODUCTIONMOVEMENTWORKSHOP, 'N') AS PRODUCTION_MOVEMENTWORKSHOP , NVL(PRODUCTIONEXCEPTIONINPUT, 'N') AS PRODUCTION_EXCEPTIONINPUT , NVL(PRODUCTIONEXCEPTIONOUTPUT, 'N') AS PRODUCTION_EXCEPTIONOUTPUT , NVL(PRODUCTIONSTOCK, 'N') AS PRODUCTION_STOCK , NVL(PRODUCTIONSTOCKINFO, 'N') AS PRODUCTION_STOCKINFO , NVL(PRODUCTIONSTOCKMOVEMENT, 'N') AS PRODUCTION_STOCKMOVEMENT , NVL(PRODUCTIONSTOCKCOUNT, 'N') AS PRODUCTION_STOCKCOUNT , NVL(PRODUCTIONSTOCKCOMPARE, 'N') AS PRODUCTION_STOCKCOMPARE , NVL(PRODUCTIONTRANSFER, 'N') AS PRODUCTION_TRANSFER , NVL(PRODUCTIONLOTHISTORY, 'N') AS PRODUCTION_LOTHISTORY
, NVL(QUALITYINCOMING, 'N') AS QUALITY_INCOMING , NVL(QUALITYPROCESS, 'N') AS QUALITY_PROCESS , NVL(QUALITYQUALITY, 'N') AS QUALITY_QUALITY , NVL(QUALITYSCRAP, 'N') AS QUALITY_SCRAP , NVL(QUALITYDEFEAT, 'N') AS QUALITY_DEFEAT , NVL(QUALITYINSPECTION, 'N') AS QUALITY_INSPECTION , NVL(QUALITYJUDGMENT, 'N') AS QUALITY_JUDGMENT , NVL(QUALITYMOVEMENTFACTORY, 'N') AS QUALITY_MOVEMENTFACTORY , NVL(QUALITYMOVEMENTSTORAGE, 'N') AS QUALITY_MOVEMENTSTORAGE , NVL(QUALITYMOVEMENTWORKSHOP, 'N') AS QUALITY_MOVEMENTWORKSHOP , NVL(QUALITYEXCEPTIONINPUT, 'N') AS QUALITY_EXCEPTIONINPUT , NVL(QUALITYEXCEPTIONOUTPUT, 'N') AS QUALITY_EXCEPTIONOUTPUT , NVL(QUALITYSTOCK, 'N') AS QUALITY_STOCK , NVL(QUALITYSTOCKINFO, 'N') AS QUALITY_STOCKINFO , NVL(QUALITYLOTHISTORY, 'N') AS QUALITY_LOTHISTORY , NVL(QUALITYSTOCKMOVEMENT, 'N') AS QUALITY_STOCKMOVEMENT , NVL(QUALITYSTOCKCOUNT, 'N') AS QUALITY_STOCKCOUNT , NVL(QUALITYSTOCKCOMPARE, 'N') AS QUALITY_STOCKCOMPARE
, NVL(SALESWIP, 'N') AS SALES_WIP , NVL(SALESWIPRETURN, 'N') AS SALES_WIPRETURN , NVL(SALESINCOMING, 'N') AS SALES_INCOMING , NVL(SALESINCOMINGRETURN, 'N') AS SALES_INCOMINGRETURN , NVL(SALESLOAD, 'N') AS SALES_LOAD , NVL(SALESLOADRETURN, 'N') AS SALES_LOADRETURN , NVL(SALESUNPACK, 'N') AS SALES_UNPACK , NVL(SALESMOVEMENTFACTORY, 'N') AS SALES_MOVEMENTFACTORY , NVL(SALESMOVEMENTSTORAGE, 'N') as SALES_MOVEMENTSTORAGE , NVL(SALESEXCEPTIONINPUT, 'N') AS SALES_EXCEPTIONINPUT , NVL(SALESEXCEPTIONOUTPUT, 'N') AS SALES_EXCEPTIONOUTPUT , NVL(SALESSTOCK, 'N') AS SALES_STOCK , NVL(SALESSTOCKINFO, 'N') AS SALES_STOCKINFO , NVL(SALESLOTHISTORY, 'N') AS SALES_LOTHISTORY , NVL(SALESSTOCKMOVEMENT, 'N') AS SALES_STOCKMOVEMENT , NVL(SALESSTOCKCOUNT, 'N') AS SALES_STOCKCOUNT , NVL(SALESSTOCKCOMPARE, 'N') AS SALES_STOCKCOMPARE , NVL(SALESTRANSFER, 'N') AS SALES_TRANSFER
, NVL(FABRICPALLETLABELLIST, 'N') AS FABRIC_PALLETLABELLIST , NVL(FABRICINCOMING, 'N') AS FABRIC_INCOMING , NVL(FABRICINCOMINGRETURN, 'N') AS FABRIC_INCOMINGRETURN , NVL(FABRICLOCATIONSTATUS, 'N') AS FABRIC_LOCATIONSTATUS , NVL(FABRICWIP, 'N') AS FABRIC_WIP , NVL(FABRICWIPRETURN, 'N') AS FABRIC_WIPRETURN , NVL(FABRICMOVEMENTFACTORY, 'N') AS FABRIC_MOVEMENTFACTORY , NVL(FABRICMOVEMENTSTORAGE, 'N') AS FABRIC_MOVEMENTSTORAGE , NVL(FABRICEXCEPTIONINPUT, 'N') AS FABRIC_EXCEPTIONINPUT , NVL(FABRICEXCEPTIONOUTPUT, 'N') AS FABRIC_EXCEPTIONOUTPUT , NVL(FABRICSTOCK, 'N') AS FABRIC_STOCK , NVL(FABRICSTOCKINFO, 'N') AS FABRIC_STOCKINFO , NVL(FABRICLOTHISTORY, 'N') AS FABRIC_LOTHISTORY , NVL(FABRICSTOCKCOUNT, 'N') AS FABRIC_STOCKCOUNT , NVL(FABRICSTOCKCOMPARE, 'N') AS FABRIC_STOCKCOMPARE
, NVL(DASHBOARDPARTREQUIREMENT, 'N') AS DASHBOARD_PARTREQUIREMENT , NVL(DASHBOARDFABRICUSAGE, 'N') AS DASHBOARD_FABRICUSAGE FROM T_WMS_USER_MENU_ACCESS WHERE id = #{sabun} AND NAME = #{name}

SELECT ROLE_ID, MENU_CODE FROM T_WMS_ROLE_PERMISSION WHERE USEYN = 'Y' AND ROLE_ID IN
#{roleId}
mapper.update:
UPDATE T_WMS_USER_MENU_ACCESS SET
BASICDATA = #{BASICDATA_STATUS}'N', PURCHASE = #{PURCHASE_STATUS}'N', FABRIC = #{FABRIC_STATUS}'N', PRODUCTION = #{PRODUCTION_STATUS}'N', SALES = #{SALES_STATUS}'N', QUALITY = #{QUALITY_STATUS}'N',
USERINFO = #{BASICDATA_USERINFO}'N', PRODUCTINFO = #{BASICDATA_PRODUCTINFO}'N', BOMINFO = #{BASICDATA_BOMINFO}'N', WAREHOUSELAYOUT = #{BASICDATA_WAREHOUSELAYOUT}'N', CONSIGNEE = #{BASICDATA_CONSIGNEE}'N',
PALLETLABELLIST = #{PURCHASE_PALLETLABELLIST}'N', INCOMING = #{PURCHASE_INCOMING}'N', INCOMINGRETURN = #{PURCHASE_INCOMINGRETURN}'N', WIP = #{PURCHASE_WIP}'N', WIPRETURN = #{PURCHASE_WIPRETURN}'N', LOAD = #{PURCHASE_LOAD}'N', LOADRETURN = #{PURCHASE_LOADRETURN}'N', LOCATIONSTATUS = #{PURCHASE_LOCATIONSTATUS}'N', STOCK = #{PURCHASE_STOCK}'N', STOCKCOUNT = #{PURCHASE_STOCKCOUNT}'N', MOVEMENTSTORAGE = #{PURCHASE_MOVEMENTSTORAGE}'N', MOVEMENTFACTORY = #{PURCHASE_MOVEMENTFACTORY}'N', UNPACK = #{PURCHASE_UNPACK}'N', EXCEPTIONINPUT = #{PURCHASE_EXCEPTIONINPUT}'N', EXCEPTIONOUTPUT = #{PURCHASE_EXCEPTIONOUTPUT}'N', PURCHASEFEEDING = #{PURCHASE_FEEDING}'N', STOCKINFO = #{PURCHASE_STOCKINFO}'N', LOTHISTORY = #{PURCHASE_LOTHISTORY}'N', STOCKCOMPARE = #{PURCHASE_STOCKCOMPARE}'N', STOCKMOVEMENT = #{PURCHASE_STOCKMOVEMENT}'N',
SEMIPRODUCTION = #{PRODUCTION_SEMIPRODUCTION}'N', TRANSFER = #{PRODUCTION_TRANSFER}'N', PRODUCTIONPRODUCTIONPRODUCTION = #{PRODUCTION_PRODUCTIONPRODUCTION}'N', PRODUCTIONWIPINPUT = #{PRODUCTION_WIPINPUT}'N', PRODUCTIONWIPRETURN = #{PRODUCTION_WIPRETURN}'N', PRODUCTIONMOVEMENTWORKSHOP = #{PRODUCTION_MOVEMENTWORKSHOP}'N', PRODUCTIONEXCEPTIONINPUT = #{PRODUCTION_EXCEPTIONINPUT}'N', PRODUCTIONEXCEPTIONOUTPUT = #{PRODUCTION_EXCEPTIONOUTPUT}'N', PRODUCTIONSTOCK = #{PRODUCTION_STOCK}'N', PRODUCTIONSTOCKINFO = #{PRODUCTION_STOCKINFO}'N', PRODUCTIONSTOCKMOVEMENT = #{PRODUCTION_STOCKMOVEMENT}'N', PRODUCTIONSTOCKCOUNT = #{PRODUCTION_STOCKCOUNT}'N', PRODUCTIONSTOCKCOMPARE = #{PRODUCTION_STOCKCOMPARE}'N', PRODUCTIONTRANSFER = #{PRODUCTION_TRANSFER}'N', PRODUCTIONLOTHISTORY = #{PRODUCTION_LOTHISTORY}'N',
FABRICPALLETLABELLIST = #{FABRIC_PALLETLABELLIST}'N', FABRICINCOMING = #{FABRIC_INCOMING}'N', FABRICINCOMINGRETURN = #{FABRIC_INCOMINGRETURN}'N', FABRICLOCATIONSTATUS = #{FABRIC_LOCATIONSTATUS}'N', FABRICWIP = #{FABRIC_WIP}'N', FABRICWIPRETURN = #{FABRIC_WIPRETURN}'N', FABRICMOVEMENTFACTORY = #{FABRIC_MOVEMENTFACTORY}'N', FABRICMOVEMENTSTORAGE = #{FABRIC_MOVEMENTSTORAGE}'N', FABRICEXCEPTIONINPUT = #{FABRIC_EXCEPTIONINPUT}'N', FABRICEXCEPTIONOUTPUT = #{FABRIC_EXCEPTIONOUTPUT}'N', FABRICSTOCK = #{FABRIC_STOCK}'N', FABRICSTOCKINFO = #{FABRIC_STOCKINFO}'N', FABRICLOTHISTORY = #{FABRIC_LOTHISTORY}'N', FABRICSTOCKCOUNT = #{FABRIC_STOCKCOUNT}'N', FABRICSTOCKCOMPARE = #{FABRIC_STOCKCOMPARE}'N',
SALESINCOMING = #{SALES_INCOMING}'N', SALESINCOMINGRETURN = #{SALES_INCOMINGRETURN}'N', SALESLOAD = #{SALES_LOAD}'N', SALESLOADRETURN = #{SALES_LOADRETURN}'N', SALESUNPACK = #{SALES_UNPACK}'N', SALESMOVEMENTFACTORY = #{SALES_MOVEMENTFACTORY}'N', SALESMOVEMENTSTORAGE = #{SALES_MOVEMENTSTORAGE}'N', SALESEXCEPTIONINPUT = #{SALES_EXCEPTIONINPUT}'N', SALESEXCEPTIONOUTPUT = #{SALES_EXCEPTIONOUTPUT}'N', SALESSTOCK = #{SALES_STOCK}'N', SALESSTOCKINFO = #{SALES_STOCKINFO}'N', SALESLOTHISTORY = #{SALES_LOTHISTORY}'N', SALESSTOCKMOVEMENT = #{SALES_STOCKMOVEMENT}'N', SALESSTOCKCOUNT = #{SALES_STOCKCOUNT}'N', SALESSTOCKCOMPARE = #{SALES_STOCKCOMPARE}'N', SALESTRANSFER = #{SALES_TRANSFER}'N',
QUALITYINCOMING = #{QUALITY_INCOMING}'N', QUALITYPROCESS = #{QUALITY_PROCESS}'N', QUALITYQUALITY = #{QUALITY_QUALITY}'N', QUALITYSCRAP = #{QUALITY_SCRAP}'N', QUALITYDEFEAT = #{QUALITY_DEFEAT}'N', QUALITYINSPECTION = #{QUALITY_INSPECTION}'N', QUALITYJUDGMENT = #{QUALITY_JUDGMENT}'N', QUALITYMOVEMENTFACTORY = #{QUALITY_MOVEMENTFACTORY}'N', QUALITYMOVEMENTSTORAGE = #{QUALITY_MOVEMENTSTORAGE}'N', QUALITYMOVEMENTWORKSHOP = #{QUALITY_MOVEMENTWORKSHOP}'N', QUALITYEXCEPTIONINPUT = #{QUALITY_EXCEPTIONINPUT}'N', QUALITYEXCEPTIONOUTPUT = #{QUALITY_EXCEPTIONOUTPUT}'N', QUALITYSTOCK = #{QUALITY_STOCK}'N', QUALITYSTOCKINFO = #{QUALITY_STOCKINFO}'N', QUALITYLOTHISTORY = #{QUALITY_LOTHISTORY}'N', QUALITYSTOCKMOVEMENT = #{QUALITY_STOCKMOVEMENT}'N', QUALITYSTOCKCOUNT = #{QUALITY_STOCKCOUNT}'N', QUALITYSTOCKCOMPARE = #{QUALITY_STOCKCOMPARE}'N'
WHERE UPPER(ID) IN
UPPER(#{id})
UPDATE T_WMS_USER_ROLE SET USEYN = 'N' WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND ROLE_ID <> 'MANAGER' AND USEYN = 'Y'

MERGE INTO T_WMS_USER_ROLE A USING ( SELECT #{userId} AS USER_ID, 'MANAGER' AS ROLE_ID, 'Y' AS USEYN FROM DUAL ) B ON (A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID AND A.ROLE_ID = B.ROLE_ID) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET USEYN = 'Y' WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (USER_ID, ROLE_ID, USEYN) VALUES (B.USER_ID, B.ROLE_ID, B.USEYN)
mapper.select: SELECT ROLE_ID FROM T_WMS_USER_ROLE WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND USEYN = 'Y'
mapper.update: MERGE INTO T_WMS_USER_ROLE A USING ( SELECT #{userId} AS USER_ID, #{roleId} AS ROLE_ID, 'Y' AS USEYN FROM DUAL ) B ON (A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID AND A.ROLE_ID = B.ROLE_ID) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET USEYN = 'Y' WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (USER_ID, ROLE_ID, USEYN) VALUES (B.USER_ID, B.ROLE_ID, B.USEYN)
mapper.select:
SELECT MENU_CODE FROM T_WMS_ROLE_PERMISSION WHERE USEYN = 'Y' AND ROLE_ID IN
#{roleId}
mapper.update: MERGE INTO T_WMS_USER_PERMISSION_OVERRIDE A USING ( SELECT #{userId} AS USER_ID, #{menuCode} AS MENU_CODE, 'Y' AS USEYN FROM DUAL ) B ON (A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID AND A.MENU_CODE = B.MENU_CODE) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET USEYN = 'Y' WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (USER_ID, MENU_CODE, USEYN) VALUES (B.USER_ID, B.MENU_CODE, B.USEYN)

MERGE INTO T_WMS_USER_PERMISSION_OVERRIDE A USING ( SELECT #{userId} AS USER_ID, #{menuCode} AS MENU_CODE, 'N' AS USEYN FROM DUAL ) B ON (A.USER_ID = B.USER_ID AND A.MENU_CODE = B.MENU_CODE) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET USEYN = 'N' WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (USER_ID, MENU_CODE, USEYN) VALUES (B.USER_ID, B.MENU_CODE, B.USEYN)
mapper.select: WITH ROLE_MENU AS ( SELECT DISTINCT B.MENU_CODE FROM T_WMS_USER_ROLE A JOIN T_WMS_ROLE_PERMISSION B ON A.ROLE_ID = B.ROLE_ID WHERE UPPER(A.LOGINID) = UPPER(#{id}) AND A.USEYN = 'Y' AND B.USEYN = 'Y' ), FINAL_MENU AS ( SELECT A.MENU_CODE, CASE WHEN C.MENU_CODE IS NOT NULL THEN C.USEYN WHEN B.MENU_CODE IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS FINAL_USEYN FROM T_WMS_MENU A LEFT JOIN ROLE_MENU B ON A.MENU_CODE = B.MENU_CODE LEFT JOIN T_WMS_USER_PERMISSION_OVERRIDE C ON UPPER(C.LOGINID) = UPPER(#{id}) AND C.MENU_CODE = A.MENU_CODE WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y' ) SELECT MENU_CODE FROM FINAL_MENU WHERE FINAL_USEYN = 'Y' ORDER BY MENU_CODE
SELECT KS_NAME, KS_ID, KS_INDATE, KS_WMSLOGINYN, KS_FACTORY_ACCESS, KS_FACTORY, KS_BUSOR, KS_DML_ACCESS FROM T_WMS_USER WHERE KS_ID = #{id}
mapper.update:
update t_wms_user set ks_factory_access = UPPER(#{factory}) where ks_id in
#{item.id}
mapper.select: SELECT count(*) from t_wms_user where (UPPER(ks_factory_access) = UPPER(#{factory}) OR UPPER(ks_factory_access) = 'ALL') and UPPER(KS_ID) = UPPER(#{userId})
select count(*) from t_wms_user where ks_wmsloginyn = 'Y' AND upper(ks_id) = upper(#{ks_id})
select count(*) from t_wms_user_menu_access where sabun = #{ks_sabun}
mapper.insert: insert into t_wms_user ( ks_id, ks_passwd, ks_busor, ks_wmsloginyn, ks_name, ks_indate, ks_inuser, ks_gubun, ks_factory ) values ( #{ks_id}, #{ks_passwd}, #{ks_busor}, 'Y', #{ks_name}, #{ks_indate}, #{ks_inuser}, '01', #{ks_factory} )

INSERT INTO t_wms_user_menu_access (SABUN, ID, PASSWORD, NAME, INUSER, INDATE, BASICDATA, PURCHASE, FABRIC, PRODUCTION, SALES, QUALITY) VALUES (#{ks_sabun}, #{ks_id}, #{ks_passwd}, #{ks_name}, #{ks_inuser}, #{ks_indate}, 'Y', 'Y', 'Y', 'Y', 'Y', 'Y')
mapper.update: update t_wms_user set ks_passwd = #{pass}, ks_name = #{name} where ks_id = #{id}
update t_wms_user_menu_access set password = #{pass}, name = #{name} where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select a.sdate, a.factory, a.storage, a.qty,a.location, a.barcode, b.itemname, a.itemcode, b.spec as oitemcode from t_wms_location a left join t_mi_item b on a.itemcode = b.itemcode and b.deldate = ' '
where a.useyn = 'Y'
ORDER BY a.sdate desc, a.location

SELECT COUNT(*) from t_wms_location a left join t_mi_item b on a.itemcode = b.itemcode and b.deldate = ' ' where useyn = 'Y'
ORDER BY sdate, location
SELECT SUM(QTY) FROM T_WMS_LOCATION a left join t_mi_item b on a.itemcode = b.itemcode and b.deldate = ' ' WHERE USEYN = 'Y'

select a.indate, a.factory, a.storage, a.qty,a.location, a.barcode, b.itemname, a.itemcode from t_wms_location a left join t_mi_item b on a.itemcode = b.itemcode
where a.useyn = 'Y'
ORDER BY a.indate desc, a.location
SELECT mdate, pbarcode, bbarcode FROM t_scm_pallet WHERE pbarcode IN ( SELECT pbarcode FROM t_scm_pallet WHERE bbarcode = #{barcode} ) ORDER BY bbarcode
select a.sdate,a.qty,a.location from t_wms_location a where a.itemcode = UPPER(#{itemcode}) AND a.useyn = 'Y' ORDER BY sdate desc, location

SELECT useyn as use_yn, sdate, kind, barcode, factory, storage, mktime as time, location, work, qty, laststatus as last_status, loginid, memo,
count(*) over() totalCount FROM v_itemhistory v WHERE 1=1
AND UPPER(v.barcode) = UPPER(#{barcode})
AND upper(v.location) = upper(#{location})

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM v_itemhistory v WHERE 1=1
AND UPPER(v.barcode) = UPPER(#{barcode})
AND upper(v.location) = upper(#{location})
AND v.kind NOT IN ('UNPACKSUB')

select distinct barcode from v_itemhistory WHERE 1=1
AND UPPER(barcode) LIKE UPPER('%' || #{barcode} || '%')

SELECT NVL(r.factory, l.factory) AS factory, NVL(r.storage, l.storage) AS storage, NVL(r.itemcode, l.itemcode) AS itemcode, NVL(r.barcode, l.barcode) AS barcode, r.location AS rlocation, l.location AS llocation, CASE WHEN r.location = l.location THEN 'TRUE' ELSE 'FALSE' END AS difflocation, NVL(r.qty, 0) AS rqty, NVL(l.qty, 0) AS lqty, NVL(r.qty, 0) - NVL(l.qty, 0) AS diffqty FROM (SELECT factory, storage, itemcode, barcode, location, qty FROM ( SELECT factory, storage, itemcode, barcode, location, qty, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY factory, storage, itemcode, barcode ORDER BY CASE WHEN UPPER(scantype) = 'LOCATION' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, sdate DESC, ymdhms DESC ) AS rn FROM t_wms_realstock WHERE useyn = 'Y'
AND sdate = #{startdate}
AND UPPER(itemcode) LIKE '%' || #{itemcode} || '%'
) WHERE rn = 1
AND upper(factory) = upper(#{factory})
AND UPPER(storage) IN ('MATERIAL', 'SIDE SEAT', 'OUTSIDE')
AND UPPER(storage) = UPPER(#{storage})
AND UPPER(storage) = UPPER('Material')
) r FULL JOIN (SELECT sdate, barcode, qty, loginid, itemcode, location, factory, storage FROM t_wms_location WHERE (useyn = 'Y' OR YMDHMS_D > REPLACE(#{startdate}, '-', '') || '235959' )
AND upper(factory) = upper(#{factory})
AND UPPER(storage) IN ('MATERIAL', 'SIDE SEAT', 'OUTSIDE')
AND UPPER(storage) = UPPER(#{storage})
AND UPPER(storage) = UPPER('Material')
AND sdate <= #{startdate}
AND UPPER(itemcode) LIKE '%' || #{itemcode} || '%'
AND UPPER(rack) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{rack}) || '%' ) l ON r.factory = l.factory AND r.storage = l.storage AND r.itemcode = l.itemcode AND r.barcode = l.barcode ORDER BY difflocation, diffqty,llocation
SELECT MAX(sdate) as sdate FROM T_WMS_REALSTOCK_DATE WHERE UPPER(storage) = UPPER(#{storage}) and sdate like SUBSTR(#{startdate}, 1, 7) || '%'

SELECT NVL(r.factory, l.factory) AS factory, NVL(r.storage, l.storage) AS storage, NVL(r.itemcode, l.itemcode) AS itemcode, NVL(r.barcode, l.barcode) AS barcode, r.location AS rlocation, l.location AS llocation, CASE WHEN r.location = l.location THEN 'TRUE' ELSE 'FALSE' END AS difflocation, NVL(r.qty, 0) AS rqty, NVL(l.qty, 0) AS lqty, NVL(r.qty, 0) - NVL(l.qty, 0) AS diffqty FROM (SELECT factory, storage, itemcode, barcode, location, qty FROM ( SELECT factory, storage, itemcode, barcode, location, qty, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY factory, storage, itemcode, barcode ORDER BY CASE WHEN UPPER(scantype) = 'LOCATION' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, sdate DESC, ROWID ) AS rn FROM t_wms_realstock WHERE useyn = 'Y'
AND upper(factory) = upper(#{factory})
AND UPPER(storage) IN ('MATERIAL', 'SIDE SEAT', 'OUTSIDE')
AND UPPER(storage) = UPPER(#{storage})
AND UPPER(storage) = UPPER('Material')
AND sdate = #{startdate}
AND UPPER(itemcode) LIKE '%' || #{itemcode} || '%'
) WHERE rn = 1
) r FULL JOIN (SELECT sdate, barcode, qty, loginid, itemcode, location, factory, storage FROM t_wms_location WHERE (useyn = 'Y' OR YMDHMS_D > REPLACE(#{startdate}, '-', '') || '235959' )
AND upper(factory) = upper(#{factory})
AND UPPER(storage) IN ('MATERIAL', 'SIDE SEAT', 'OUTSIDE')
AND UPPER(storage) = UPPER(#{storage})
AND UPPER(storage) = UPPER('Material')
AND sdate <= #{startdate}
AND UPPER(itemcode) LIKE '%' || #{itemcode} || '%'
AND UPPER(rack) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{rack}) || '%' ) l ON r.factory = l.factory AND r.storage = l.storage AND r.itemcode = l.itemcode AND r.barcode = l.barcode ORDER BY difflocation, diffqty,llocation

SELECT count(*) FROM ( SELECT COALESCE(a.sdate, r.sdate) as sdate, COALESCE(a.location, r.location) as location, COALESCE(a.factory, r.factory) as factory, COALESCE(a.storage, r.storage) as storage, COALESCE(a.car, r.car) as car, r.itemcode as itemcode_real, r.itemname as itemname_real, r.qty_sum as qty_real, r.qty_cnt as cnt_real, a.itemcode as itemcode_system, a.itemname as itemname_system, a.qty_sum as qty_system, a.qty_cnt as cnt_system FROM ( SELECT a.sdate, a.location, a.factory, a.storage, c1.subname_ch as car, a.itemcode, a_item.itemname, SUM(a.qty) as qty_sum, COUNT(*) as qty_cnt FROM t_wms_stock a LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item a_item ON a.itemcode = a_item.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c1 ON a_item.carno = c1.subcode AND c1.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE
TO_DATE(a.sdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') = TO_DATE(#{startdate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
TO_DATE(a.sdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') =TRUNC(SYSDATE)
GROUP BY a.sdate, a.location, c1.subname_ch, a.itemcode, a_item.itemname, a.factory, a.storage ) a FULL OUTER JOIN ( SELECT r.sdate, r.location, r.factory, r.storage, c2.subname_ch as car, r.itemcode, r_item.itemname, SUM(r.qty) as qty_sum, COUNT(*) as qty_cnt FROM t_wms_realstock r LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_item r_item ON r.itemcode = r_item.itemcode LEFT OUTER JOIN t_mi_typesub c2 ON r_item.carno = c2.subcode AND c2.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE
TO_DATE(r.sdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') = TO_DATE(#{startdate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
TO_DATE(r.sdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') = TRUNC(SYSDATE)
GROUP BY r.sdate, r.location, c2.subname_ch, r.itemcode, r_item.itemname,r.factory, r.storage ) r ON TO_DATE(a.sdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') = TO_DATE(r.sdate, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND a.location = r.location AND a.itemcode = r.itemcode WHERE 1=1
) t

SELECT count(*) FROM ( SELECT l.indate, l.location, l.barcode, l.itemcode, l.qty FROM t_wms_location l LEFT JOIN t_wms_realstock r ON r.useyn = 'Y' AND r.barcode = l.barcode
WHERE (l.useyn = 'Y' OR l.YMDHMS_D > REPLACE(#{startdate}, '-', '') || '235959' )
AND r.location IS NULL ORDER BY location ) t

SELECT nvl(sum(l.qty),0) FROM t_wms_location l LEFT JOIN t_wms_realstock r ON r.useyn = 'Y' AND r.barcode = l.barcode
WHERE (l.useyn = 'Y' OR l.YMDHMS_D > REPLACE(#{startdate}, '-', '') || '235959' )
AND r.location IS NULL

SELECT useyn as use_yn, sdate, kind, barcode, factory, storage, mktime as time, location, work, qty, laststatus as last_status, loginid, memo FROM v_itemhistory v WHERE 1=1
AND UPPER(v.barcode) = UPPER(#{barcode})
AND upper(v.location) = upper(#{location})
--AND v.kind NOT IN ('UNPACKSUB') --ORDER BY mktime DESC, kind, useyn DESC

SELECT indate, location, barcode, itemcode, '0', qty FROM t_wms_location WHERE indate = DATE '${sdate}' AND useyn = 'N' AND memo_d = 'CHANGE'
AND SUBSTR(ymdhms_d,1,8) = REPLACE('${sdate}', '-', '') ORDER BY location

SELECT SDATE, LOCATION, BARCODE, ITEMCODE, QTY AS realqty, '0' AS systemqty FROM ( SELECT R.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY LOCATION, BARCODE ORDER BY SDATE ) AS RN FROM T_WMS_REALSTOCK R WHERE SDATE = DATE '${sdate}' AND USEYN = 'Y'
) X

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(v.qty), 0) as total_qty FROM v_itemhistory v WHERE 1=1
AND UPPER(v.barcode) = UPPER(#{barcode})
AND upper(v.location) = upper(#{location})
AND v.kind NOT IN ('UNPACKSUB')

SELECT SDATE, LOCATION, BARCODE, ITEMCODE, QTY AS realqty, '0' AS systemqty FROM ( SELECT R.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY LOCATION, BARCODE ORDER BY SDATE ) AS RN FROM T_WMS_REALSTOCK R
WHERE TRIM(SDATE) = #{sdate} AND USEYN = 'Y'
AND UPPER(factory) = UPPER(#{factory})
AND UPPER(itemcode) = UPPER(#{itemcode})
AND UPPER(storage) = UPPER(#{storage})
AND location = #{location} ) X
UNION ALL
SELECT indate, location, barcode, itemcode, '0' AS realqty, qty AS systemqty FROM t_wms_location
WHERE TRIM(indate) = #{sdate} AND useyn = 'N'
AND UPPER(factory) = UPPER(#{factory})
AND UPPER(itemcode) = UPPER(#{itemcode})
AND UPPER(storage) = UPPER(#{storage})
AND memo_d = 'CHANGE'
AND SUBSTR(TRIM(ymdhms_d), 1, 8) = REPLACE(#{sdate}, '-', '') AND location = #{location}
ORDER BY location

SELECT indate, location, barcode, itemcode, '0', qty FROM t_wms_location WHERE indate = DATE '${sdate}' AND useyn = 'N' AND memo_d = 'CHANGE'
AND SUBSTR(ymdhms_d,1,8) = REPLACE('${sdate}', '-', '') ORDER BY location

SELECT SDATE, LOCATION, BARCODE, ITEMCODE, QTY AS realqty, '0' AS systemqty FROM ( SELECT R.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY LOCATION, BARCODE ORDER BY SDATE ) AS RN FROM T_WMS_REALSTOCK R WHERE SDATE = DATE '${sdate}' AND USEYN = 'Y'
) X

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT kind, itemcode, factory, storage, sdate, plusqty, minusqty, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY sdate, plusqty desc, CASE WHEN kind='INVENTORY' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS rn FROM v_stock WHERE
) WHERE rn BETWEEN #{offset} + 1 AND #{offset} + #{itemsPerPage} ORDER BY rn

SELECT kind, itemcode, factory, storage, sdate, plusqty, minusqty FROM v_stock WHERE
ORDER BY sdate, plusqty desc, CASE WHEN kind='INVENTORY' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM v_stock WHERE

SELECT a.factory, a.storage, a.sdate, a.barcode, a.itemcode, a.qty, NVL(s.scanqty, 0) AS unpacked_qty, a.qty - NVL(s.scanqty, 0) AS diff_qty FROM t_wms_unpack a LEFT JOIN ( SELECT unpackbarcode, SUM(qty) AS scanqty FROM t_scm_barcode WHERE useyn = 'Y' GROUP BY unpackbarcode ) s ON s.unpackbarcode = a.barcode WHERE a.useyn = 'Y'
AND a.qty - NVL(s.scanqty, 0) <> 0
ORDER BY a.factory, a.storage, a.sdate, a.barcode

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_wms_unpack a LEFT JOIN ( SELECT unpackbarcode, SUM(qty) AS scanqty FROM t_scm_barcode WHERE useyn = 'Y' GROUP BY unpackbarcode ) s ON s.unpackbarcode = a.barcode WHERE a.useyn = 'Y'
AND a.qty - NVL(s.scanqty, 0) <> 0

SELECT NVL(SUM(qty), 0) as total_qty FROM t_wms_unpack a LEFT JOIN ( SELECT unpackbarcode, SUM(qty) AS scanqty FROM t_scm_barcode WHERE useyn = 'Y' GROUP BY unpackbarcode ) s ON s.unpackbarcode = a.barcode WHERE a.useyn = 'Y'
AND a.qty - NVL(s.scanqty, 0) <> 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_mi_item WHERE itemcode = UPPER(#{itemcode})

SELECT SUBSTR(sdate, 1, 10) AS sdate, UPPER(factory) as factory, UPPER(storage) as storage, SUM(CASE WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(qty, '^[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$') THEN TO_NUMBER(qty) ELSE 0 END) AS total_qty, COUNT(CASE WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(qty, '^[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$') THEN qty END) AS cnt_qty FROM t_wms_location where useyn = 'Y' GROUP BY SUBSTR(sdate, 1, 10), factory, storage

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT SUBSTR(sdate, 1, 10) AS sdate, factory, storage, SUM(CASE WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(qty, '^[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$') THEN TO_NUMBER(qty) ELSE 0 END) AS total_qty, COUNT(CASE WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(qty, '^[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$') THEN qty END) AS cnt_qty FROM t_wms_location where useyn = 'Y' GROUP BY SUBSTR(sdate, 1, 10), factory, storage )

SELECT SUBSTR(ymdhms, 9, 2) AS stime, SUM( CASE WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(qty, '^[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$') THEN TO_NUMBER(qty) ELSE 0 END ) AS total_qty, COUNT( CASE WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(qty, '^[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$') THEN qty END ) AS count_qty FROM t_wms_semiwork WHERE useyn = 'Y'
AND sdate = #{sdate}
AND UPPER(TRIM(factory)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{factory}))
GROUP BY SUBSTR(ymdhms, 9, 2) ORDER BY stime

SELECT b.lineno AS lineno, SUM( CASE WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(a.qty, '^[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$') THEN TO_NUMBER(a.qty) ELSE 0 END ) AS total_qty, COUNT( CASE WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(a.qty, '^[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$') THEN a.qty END ) AS count_qty FROM t_wms_semiwork a INNER JOIN t_scm_barcode b ON a.barcode = b.barcode WHERE a.useyn = 'Y'
AND a.sdate = #{sdate}
AND UPPER(TRIM(a.factory)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{factory}))
GROUP BY b.lineno ORDER BY CASE WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(TRIM(b.lineno), '^[0-9]+$') THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, CASE WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(TRIM(b.lineno), '^[0-9]+$') THEN TO_NUMBER(TRIM(b.lineno)) END

SELECT SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 11, 2) AS stime, CASE WHEN b.lineno IS NULL THEN '정보없음' ELSE b.lineno END AS lineno, d.subname_ch, a.itemcode, c.itemname, CASE WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(a.qty, '^[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$') THEN TO_NUMBER(a.qty) ELSE 0 END AS qty FROM t_wms_semiwork a LEFT JOIN t_scm_barcode b ON a.barcode = b.barcode INNER JOIN t_mi_item c ON a.itemcode = c.itemcode INNER JOIN t_mi_typesub d ON c.carno = d.subcode AND d.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE a.useyn = 'Y'
AND a.sdate = #{sdate}
AND UPPER(TRIM(a.factory)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{factory}))
ORDER BY a.ymdhms DESC

SELECT SUM( CASE WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(a.qty, '^[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$') THEN TO_NUMBER(a.qty) ELSE 0 END ) AS total_qty, COUNT( CASE WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(a.qty, '^[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$') THEN a.qty END ) AS count_qty FROM t_wms_work a INNER JOIN t_scm_barcode b ON a.barcode = b.barcode WHERE a.useyn = 'Y'
AND a.sdate = #{sdate}
AND UPPER(TRIM(a.factory)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{factory}))
AND UPPER(TRIM(b.workplace)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{workplace}))

SELECT SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 9, 2) AS stime, SUM( CASE WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(a.qty, '^[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$') THEN TO_NUMBER(a.qty) ELSE 0 END ) AS total_qty, COUNT( CASE WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(a.qty, '^[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$') THEN a.qty END ) AS count_qty FROM t_wms_work a INNER JOIN t_scm_barcode b ON a.barcode = b.barcode WHERE a.useyn = 'Y'
AND a.sdate = #{sdate}
AND UPPER(TRIM(a.factory)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{factory}))
AND UPPER(TRIM(b.workplace)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{workplace}))
GROUP BY SUBSTR(ymdhms, 9, 2) ORDER BY stime

SELECT b.lineno AS lineno, SUM( CASE WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(a.qty, '^[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$') THEN TO_NUMBER(a.qty) ELSE 0 END ) AS total_qty, COUNT( CASE WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(a.qty, '^[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$') THEN a.qty END ) AS count_qty FROM t_wms_work a INNER JOIN t_scm_barcode b ON a.barcode = b.barcode WHERE a.useyn = 'Y'
AND a.sdate = #{sdate}
AND UPPER(TRIM(a.factory)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{factory}))
AND UPPER(TRIM(b.workplace)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{workplace}))
GROUP BY b.lineno ORDER BY CASE WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(TRIM(b.lineno), '^[0-9]+$') THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, CASE WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(TRIM(b.lineno), '^[0-9]+$') THEN TO_NUMBER(TRIM(b.lineno)) END

SELECT SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 11, 2) AS stime, CASE WHEN b.lineno IS NULL THEN '정보없음' ELSE b.lineno END AS lineno, d.subname_ch, a.itemcode, c.itemname, CASE WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(a.qty, '^[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$') THEN TO_NUMBER(a.qty) ELSE 0 END AS qty FROM t_wms_work a LEFT JOIN t_scm_barcode b ON a.barcode = b.barcode INNER JOIN t_mi_item c ON a.itemcode = c.itemcode INNER JOIN t_mi_typesub d ON c.carno = d.subcode AND d.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE a.useyn = 'Y'
AND a.sdate = #{sdate}
AND UPPER(TRIM(a.factory)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{factory}))
AND UPPER(TRIM(b.workplace)) = UPPER(TRIM(#{workplace}))
ORDER BY a.ymdhms DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_wms_stock (sdate, kind, barcode, qty, factory, storage, itemcode, loginid, insdate, memo, useyn, ymdhms) VALUES ( #{sdate}, #{source}, #{barcode}, #{qty}, #{factory}, #{storage}, #{itemcode}, #{loginid}, #{sdate}, #{memo}, 'Y', #{ymdhms} )
mapper.select: SELECT bbarcode FROM t_scm_pallet WHERE pbarcode = #{barcode} AND USEYN = 'Y'

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT X.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY ) AS RN FROM ( SELECT A.FACTORY, A.STORAGE, A.LOCATION, A.INDATE, C.SUBNAME_CH AS CAR, A.ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, B.SPEC AS SPEC, A.QTY, A.BARCODE, A.YMDHMS, A.LOGINID, SUBSTR(A.YMDHMS, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(A.YMDHMS, 11, 2) AS HHMM, CASE WHEN INSTR(A.BARCODE, ',') > 0 THEN TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(A.BARCODE, '[^,]+', 1, 2)) ELSE '' END AS BDATE, COUNT(*) OVER () AS TOTALCOUNT, SUM( CASE WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(TRIM(A.QTY), '^[0-9]+(\.[0-9]+)?$') THEN TO_NUMBER(TRIM(A.QTY)) ELSE 0 END ) OVER () AS TOTALQTY FROM T_WMS_LOCATION A LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON B.ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE LEFT JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB C ON C.SUBCODE = B.CARNO AND C.TYPECODE = 'MI041' WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y'
) X )
RN BETWEEN (NVL(#{offset}, 0) + 1) AND (NVL(#{offset}, 0) + #{limit})
ORDER BY RN

SELECT A.FACTORY, A.STORAGE, A.LOCATION, A.INDATE, C.SUBNAME_CH AS CAR, A.ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, B.SPEC AS SPEC, A.QTY, A.BARCODE, A.YMDHMS, A.LOGINID, SUBSTR(A.YMDHMS, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(A.YMDHMS, 11, 2) AS HHMM, CASE WHEN INSTR(A.BARCODE, ',') > 0 THEN TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(A.BARCODE, '[^,]+', 1, 2)) ELSE '' END AS BDATE FROM T_WMS_LOCATION A LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON B.ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE LEFT JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB C ON C.SUBCODE = B.CARNO AND C.TYPECODE = 'MI041' WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y'
ORDER BY
select condate, itemcode, qty, insuser, MAX(insdate) as insdate from t_pm_non_arrivalsub_if a where cud_div = 'I' and noinvoice = #{invoice_no} group by condate, itemcode, qty, insuser
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO T_PM_NON_ARRIVALSUB_IF ( IFNO, GUBUN, BRANCH, CONDATE, CFNO, CFSUBNO, MANCODE, BUCODE, CUSTCODE,
GORDER, GSALE, GPAY, GMONEY, EXRATE, INPUTDATE, ITEMCODE, QTY, UNITPRICE, WONAMT, VATAMT,
TOTAMT, COSTAMT, REMARK, ORDERIDX, NOINVOICE, BRNO, BRSUBNO, ERP_TRANSFER_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_FLAG, ERP_RESULT_REMARK, INSUSER,
INSDATE, UPDUSER, UPDDATE, CUD_DIV, DATA_DIV, MES_KEY, DELETE_GUBUN, MES_SEQ, PENO, PESUBNO ) SELECT T.IFNO, '01', '000', T.CONDATE, ' ', ' ', ' ', ' ', ' ',
' ', ' ', ' ', ' ', 0, ' ', T.ITEMCODE, T.QTY, 0, 0, 0,
0, 0, ' ', 0, T.NOINVOICE, ' ', ' ', 'N', 'N', ' ', 'ZZ99',
TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MI'), ' ', ' ', 'I', 'SCM', T.MES_KEY, ' ', '1', ' ', ' ' FROM (
SELECT #{r.ifno} AS IFNO, #{r.condate} AS CONDATE, #{r.itemcode} AS ITEMCODE, #{r.qty} AS QTY, #{r.invoice_no} AS NOINVOICE, #{r.mes_key} AS MES_KEY FROM dual
) T
mapper.select:
SELECT t.factory, t.storage, t.location, t.itemcode, t.itemname, SUM(t.qty) AS qty, MAX(t.useyn) AS useyn, MAX(t.useynnow) AS useynnow, MAX(t.adjust) AS adjust, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY t.location, t.itemcode) AS rn FROM ( SELECT l.factory, l.storage, l.location, l.itemcode, l.qty, i.itemname, l.useyn, (SELECT USEYN FROM T_WMS_LOCATION LL WHERE L.IID = LL.IID) AS useynnow, (SELECT memo_d FROM T_WMS_LOCATION LL WHERE L.IID = LL.IID) AS adjust FROM t_wms_locationbackup l LEFT JOIN t_wms_realstock r ON r.useyn = 'Y' AND r.itemcode = l.itemcode AND r.location = l.location AND r.factory = l.factory AND r.storage = l.storage
LEFT JOIN t_mi_item i ON i.itemcode = l.itemcode WHERE 1 = 1
AND r.location IS NULL ) t WHERE t.adjust = 'ADJUSTMENT' OR t.adjust = 'LOADEXCEPTION-NOSCAN' GROUP BY t.factory, t.storage, t.location, t.itemcode, t.itemname ORDER BY t.location, t.itemcode

SELECT
t.*, (SELECT 'SENDING' FROM T_WMS_FACTORYMOVE F WHERE F.BARCODE = T.BARCODE AND f.Sdate BETWEEN TO_CHAR(TO_DATE( #{startdate} , 'YYYY-MM-DD') - 7, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND #{startdate} AND SOURCE = 'SENDING' AND USEYN = 'Y' ) AS SENDING,
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY t.location, t.itemcode, t.barcode) AS rn FROM ( SELECT l.indate, l.factory, l.storage, l.location, l.barcode, l.itemcode, l.qty, i.itemname, l.useyn,L.YMDHMS_D, (SELECT USEYN FROM T_WMS_LOCATION LL WHERE L.IID = LL.IID) AS useynnow, (SELECT memo_d FROM T_WMS_LOCATION LL WHERE L.IID = LL.IID) AS adjust, (SELECT DISTINCT 'Y' FROM T_WMS_REALSTOCK RR WHERE L.BARCODE = RR.BARCODE AND SDATE>=#{startdate}) AS BARCODESCAN, nvl((SELECT distinct USEYN FROM T_WMS_LOCATION LL WHERE L.barcode = LL.barcode and useyn ='Y'),'N') AS useynbarcode FROM t_wms_locationBACKUP l LEFT JOIN t_wms_realstock r ON r.useyn = 'Y' AND r.barcode = l.barcode
left join t_mi_item i on i.itemcode = l.itemcode WHERE
1=1
AND r.location IS NULL) t where t.adjust = 'ADJUSTMENT' OR T.ADJUST = 'LOADEXCEPTION-NOSCAN' ORDER BY t.LOCATION, t.ITEMCODE, t.BARCODE

SELECT count(*) FROM ( SELECT l.indate, l.location, l.barcode, l.itemcode, l.qty FROM t_wms_location l LEFT JOIN t_wms_realstock r ON r.useyn = 'Y' AND r.barcode = l.barcode
WHERE (l.useyn = 'Y' OR l.YMDHMS_D > REPLACE(#{startdate}, '-', '') || '235959' )
AND r.location IS NULL ORDER BY location ) t

SELECT nvl(sum(l.qty),0) FROM t_wms_location l LEFT JOIN t_wms_realstock r ON r.useyn = 'Y' AND r.barcode = l.barcode
WHERE (l.useyn = 'Y' OR l.YMDHMS_D > REPLACE(#{startdate}, '-', '') || '235959' )
AND r.location IS NULL

SELECT indate, location, barcode, itemcode, '0', qty FROM t_wms_location WHERE indate = DATE '${sdate}' AND useyn = 'N' AND memo_d = 'CHANGE'
AND SUBSTR(ymdhms_d,1,8) = REPLACE('${sdate}', '-', '') ORDER BY location

SELECT SDATE, LOCATION, BARCODE, ITEMCODE, QTY AS realqty, '0' AS systemqty FROM ( SELECT R.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY LOCATION, BARCODE ORDER BY SDATE ) AS RN FROM T_WMS_REALSTOCK R WHERE SDATE = DATE '${sdate}' AND USEYN = 'Y'
) X
